[%INCOMING_TRANSMISSION]

"Huh? My sister..? What about her.."

"We've regret to inform you that Lyn Negotium was killed in action by an enemy marksman while on a mission in Poland, Biawystok."

"Wh-Wha.."

"Staff from the Chief of Defense and all members of the Canadian Armed Forces express their condolences. A Casualty Assistance Officer will be notified in a few hours."

"..Bien merde."

[%Description]

Avie Negotium

Age: 27

Height: 164cm

Description:

Avie Negotium, born in Quebec Canada, grew up in a middle class family with her slightly older sister, Lyn Negotium since 2010, always admiring her older sibling for their courage and practically raising her as most of the time their parents were too busy at work. Her parents had french origin from their grandparents residing in Canada since the 1920s, in which, thanks to her living in Quebec, she has been primarily speaking French to her relatives and close friends, treating English as her second language.

Late 2026 marked the beginning of the Russo-Polish conflict, triggering NATO article 4. Originally, Avie did not even bother thinking about joining the CAF, knowing she wasn't really fit for the army, at least for her. But with the sudden death of her sister, she enlisted without hesitation.
